briefs.title: BC Repeals Two PST Sections and Fixes Typo in Farm Equipment Tax Table
briefs.summary: BC updated its Provincial Sales Tax (PST) rules on October 27, 2025. Two sections of the PST Regulation — sections 45 and 46 — were removed entirely, and a spelling error in a farm equipment tax table was corrected ('Barnlitter carriers' is now 'Barn litter carriers').
briefs.action_required: Check if your business relied on PST Regulation sections 45 or 46 and consult a tax adviser if so.
